Soft and comfortable with a tailored fit

purchase_paths.canonical_product_name: M1 T-Shirt – White (Bamboo and Organic Cotton)

positives: Ethically made from 100% long-staple Egyptian cotton for next-to-skin softness.
Timeless design suitable for layering or wearing on its own.
Ethically crafted with no added synthetics for breathability.
A portion of every order funds primary schools for the children of cotton farmers.
negatives: No specific price listed on the product page.
Limited availability in physical stores; online purchase may be necessary.
Potentially higher price point compared to standard t-shirts.

purchase_paths.canonical_product_name: Circular Knit Tee (10oz Ring-Spun Cotton Jersey)
positives: High-quality 205 GSM ring-spun cotton jersey fabric
No side seams for added comfort

canadian_brands.notes: Gildan is a Canadian company headquartered in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. However, its products are manufactured in facilities primarily located in Central America, the Caribbean, the United States, and Bangladesh, not in Canada.

Reigning Champ is a Canadian brand founded in 2007, headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia. The company designs and manufactures premium athletic wear, including white t-shirts for men, with a focus on quality materials and craftsmanship. While some products are made overseas, many are handcrafted in Canada, particularly in Vancouver. The brand emphasizes its Canadian roots and production through its marketing and product labeling.

Lululemon is a Canadian-founded company headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia. However, its products, including men's white t-shirts, are primarily manufactured overseas, with production facilities in countries such as China, Vietnam, Cambodia, and Indonesia.
London, Ontario–based lifestyle brand dedicated to celebrating Canadian-made apparel, crafting each piece entirely within Ontario.

canadian_brands.top_product: Le Canadien Tee White - Mens Original
canadian_brands.notes: Toronto-founded brand launched in 2014, designing and manufacturing all its products in Canada.

canadian_brands.top_product: M1 T-Shirt – White (Bamboo and Organic Cotton)
canadian_brands.notes: Established 2010, knitted and sewn in Toronto to maintain Canadian-made production of men’s essentials.

canadian_brands.top_product: Gildan Men's Heavy Cotton T-Shirt (Style G500)
canadian_brands.notes: Montreal-founded large-scale manufacturer of blank activewear, now producing mainly overseas.
Toronto-headquartered sustainable basics retailer offering its signature Perfect T-Shirt, sourcing primarily from Egyptian cotton.

canadian_brands.top_product: Circular Knit Tee (10oz Ring-Spun Cotton Jersey)
canadian_brands.notes: Montreal-based denim specialist also manufacturing premium mid-weight t-shirts entirely in Canada.
